payload.label: basket
payload.long_description: Upright blue fabric storage basket with a diamond/quilted texture and a beige fabric handle loop on the front; rectangular open-top, soft-sided bin that is edge-cropped on the left of the image and appears to sit on the floor, approximately 0.8 m from the camera.
